name: Tilestone
description:
__Height:__ 255 cm (8'4")
__Affiliations:__ Galley-La Company
__Origin:__ Water 7 (Grand Line)
Tilestone is one of the five foremen of Dock One of Water 7. Tilestone is the last of the foremen to be formally introduced in the story, although he is present from the first scene Galley-La is shown in.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
